visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Unsigned Shift
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the midpoint logic to use the unsigned right shift operator (>>>) for safe overflow-proof math.

solution.explanation: The '>>>' operator performs an unsigned bitwise right shift. Even if 'low + high' overflows into a negative value, the unsigned shift treats it as a positive number, correctly calculating the midpoint.
